CCW Codebook - Medicare Part D Plan Election Type Beneficiary Summary
CCW Record Layout - Medicare Part D Plan Election Type Beneficiary Summary
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| BENE_ID | CCW Beneficiary ID | 
| REF_YEAR | Part D Plan Enrollment Year | 
| APLCTN_DT | Beneficiary Part D Plan Enrollment Application Date | 
| ENRLMT_EFCTV_DT | Beneficiary Part D Plan Enrollment Effective Date | 
| DISENRLMNT_DT | Beneficiary Part
